components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-authority command in a workflow region.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem; border: 1px solid var(--honey); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--honey); color: var(--ink); font: 680 0.83rem 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 170ms ease-out, border-color 170ms ease-out; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--honey-hover); border-color: var(--honey-hover); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--focus) 42%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A familiar bordered command for non-primary operations.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem; border: 1px solid var(--rule-strong); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--desk); color: var(--ink); font: 680 0.83rem 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 170ms ease-out, border-color 170ms ease-out; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { background: var(--surface-strong); border-color: var(--ink-soft); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--focus) 42%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: A compact text-bearing status; semantic color never stands alone.
components.css: .ds-status-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 28px; padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem; border: 1px solid var(--warning); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--warning-soft); color: var(--warning); font: 650 0.75rem 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

components.name: Date Field
components.description: A standard native field for historical snapshot selection.
components.html: <label class="ds-field">历史截面日期<input type="date" value="2026-07-10"></label>
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; color: var(--ink-soft); font: 400 0.875rem 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height: 44px; padding: 0.45rem 0.65rem; border: 1px solid var(--rule-strong); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--desk); color: var(--ink); } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--focus) 42%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Active Navigation Item
components.description: Current location with stable geometry and scarce honey emphasis.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--honey-soft); color: var(--ink); font: 600 0.9rem 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-active:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--focus) 42%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: AI Trade feels like a well-run investment desk after the market closes: bright enough for sustained review, dense enough for evidence comparison, and quiet enough that warnings and permissions remain unmistakable.
keyCharacteristics: Honey-amber is reserved for current authority and primary commands.
Tables, charts, ledgers, and gate checks share one compact vocabulary.
Research, paper, sandbox, and live-disabled stages are never visually conflated.
Motion communicates state in 150–250 ms and disappears under reduced-motion preferences.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Rule
rules.body: Closing Bell Honey occupies no more than ten percent of a screen. Its rarity tells the user where authority sits.

rules.name: The Signed State Rule
rules.body: Profit, loss, success, and failure always pair color with a sign, label, or familiar symbol.

rules.name: The Numeric Alignment Rule
rules.body: Comparable financial figures use tabular numerals and align by sign or decimal.

rules.name: The Accounting Surface Rule
rules.body: A shadow never implies accounting ownership. Ledgers, positions, and limits use structure and labels.

dos: Do show data dates, model configuration, account stage, and live permissions near decision surfaces.
Do keep repeated workflows compact, keyboard-accessible, and readable at 200% zoom.
Do explain errors as what happened, why it matters, and the next valid action.
Do preserve every core workflow on mobile through structural reflow.
Do keep real-order controls visibly disabled until every independent gate passes.
donts: Don't use profit-guarantee marketing, countdown urgency, social proof, or language implying the model cannot lose.
Don't use flashing red/green gambling-terminal aesthetics or decorative ticker walls.
Don't use opaque AI-agent theatre where commentary replaces deterministic evidence, parameters, and code.
Don't use marketing hero layouts, oversized slogans, glassmorphism, purple-blue gradients, or endless decorative card grids.
Don't hide stale data, rejected orders, drawdown, configuration drift, or unavailable live permissions.
